_notes.id: required bus client id for the MSP bridge
_notes.conn_type: required link type for the MSPAPI2 transport (serial/tcp/etc)
_notes.conn_str: required address string such as '/dev/ttyACM0' or 'tcp:127.0.0.1:9000'
_notes.is_interface: optional; true when this link is the primary flight controller interface
_notes.is_datalink: optional; true when the link is used as a datalink hop
